summary: WhatsApp messaging feature (REQ-6) fully tested. All backend APIs include patient_phone field. All frontend WhatsApp buttons present and functional. Phone formatting utility works correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/appointments returns patient_phone field
Backend: GET /api/appointments returns patient_phone field in all appointments
Backend: POST /api/therapy-schedules returns patient_phone field
Backend: GET /api/therapy-schedules returns patient_phone field in all schedules
Backend: Patients have phone numbers for WhatsApp messaging
Backend: Patient report provides context for WhatsApp messages (prescriptions, checkin_history)
Phone Formatting: 10-digit number adds 91 prefix correctly
Phone Formatting: 12-digit number with 91 prefix unchanged
Phone Formatting: 11-digit number with 0 prefix formatted correctly
Phone Formatting: Number with spaces formatted correctly
Phone Formatting: Number with dashes formatted correctly
Phone Formatting: Number with + prefix formatted correctly
Phone Formatting: Empty phone returns null
Frontend: Patient Details page shows WhatsApp Quick Messages section
Frontend: Patient Details page has 4 WhatsApp buttons (General Message, Follow-up Reminder, Diet Instructions, Medicine Refill)
Frontend: WhatsApp section shows patient phone number
Frontend: WhatsApp section has green styling (#25D366)
Frontend: Appointments page shows WhatsApp reminder button on scheduled appointments
Frontend: Therapy Scheduling page shows WhatsApp reminder button on scheduled therapy sessions
Frontend: WhatsApp buttons only appear when patient has phone number
Frontend: WhatsApp buttons only appear on 'scheduled' status items (not completed/cancelled)
seed_data_creation: Created test appointment and therapy schedule to verify WhatsApp buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp messaging feature fully functional. Uses wa.me click-to-chat links (no API needed). Phone formatting adds India country code (91) to 10-digit numbers. WhatsApp buttons appear on: Patient Details page (4 buttons), Appointments page (reminder button on scheduled appointments), Therapy Scheduling page (reminder button on scheduled sessions). Buttons only show when patient has phone number and status is 'scheduled'.

functions: getWhatsAppLink - generates wa.me URL with encoded message
openWhatsApp - opens WhatsApp in new tab

patient_details_whatsapp.styling: Green border (#25D366), green text, rounded-full buttons

appointments_whatsapp.condition: Only shows when apt.status === 'scheduled' AND apt.patient_phone exists

therapy_scheduling_whatsapp.condition: Only shows when s.status === 'scheduled' AND s.patient_phone exists

backend_patient_phone.appointments: patient_phone field added to appointment_doc (server.py line 1060)
backend_patient_phone.therapy_schedules: patient_phone field added to schedule_doc (server.py line 2730)
